course_page.title: My Courses
course_page.subtitle: Pick a course to continue, or start a new learning goal

course_card.delete_warning: All roadmaps and records will be removed

new_course.title: New Course
new_course.label: Course Name
new_course.error_failed: Failed to create. Please try again.

course_info_modal.title: Course Info
course_info_modal.profile_hint: Learning Profile (optional — helps AI plan a personalised roadmap)
course_info_modal.goal_placeholder: What level do you want to reach? Why are you learning this?
course_info_modal.known_placeholder: Topics you already know, e.g. Python basics, SQL queries, Git
course_info_modal.time_placeholder: Hours per day? How many months?
course_info_modal.error_save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
course_info_modal.error_create_failed: Failed to create. Please try again.

dag_page.preset_create_roadmap_prefix: Please create a learning roadmap for me. My goal is
dag_page.preset_add_node_prefix: Please add a new node to the roadmap. The content is

node_page.chat_empty:
Describe your learning goal
and I'll generate materials for you
node_page.preset_gen_theory_prefix: Following the current node outline, please generate theory material. Requirements:
node_page.preset_gen_practice_prefix: Following the current node outline, please generate practice exercises. Requirements:
node_page.preset_gen_review_prefix: I've finished this node. Please generate a Feynman review checklist. Requirements:
node_page.preset_gen_outline_prefix: Please generate (or upgrade) the knowledge outline for the current node
node_page.preset_gen_topic_prefix: I want to go deeper on a specific topic. First list the available components from the current outline, then I'll pick one.
node_page.complete_desc: To finish a node well, follow this learning flow:
node_page.complete_theory_detail: Understand core concepts and save materials to the Theory folder
node_page.complete_practice_detail: Do hands-on exercises and save notes to the Practice folder
node_page.complete_review_detail: Use the Feynman technique to verify real understanding

dag_canvas.empty_subtitle: Describe your goal on the right and click "Create Roadmap"

chat_messages.empty_default:
Describe your learning goal
and I'll help you plan a route

editor_area.click_to_open: Click a file on the left to open

chat_panel.web_search_no_key: Tavily API key not configured. Go to Settings → Search to add your key.

chat_input.placeholder: Type a message or click a quick command above…
chat_input.unsupported_format: Unsupported format: {{name}}. Supported: images (JPG/PNG/GIF/WEBP), PDF, and text/code files (MD/TXT/JS/TS/PY/GO/JSON/CSV, etc.)

appearance.theme_desc: Changes take effect immediately; restored on next launch
appearance.theme_warm_desc: Warm cream, easy on the eyes
appearance.theme_white_desc: Pure neutral white, clean and crisp

model.api_key_desc: Configure API keys for each provider. Click to expand.
model.no_key_needed: This provider does not require an API key
model.key_stored_in_keychain: Key is stored in system Keychain — never written to any file
model.add_provider_key_name_placeholder: Leave blank to use provider ID
model.add_provider_key: API Key (optional — configure later in the list)

learning.guidance_desc: Controls how the AI guides you while learning

search.intro: When configured, the AI will search the web for up-to-date content while generating study materials. Without keys it falls back to pure LLM generation.
search.tavily_desc: General web search, great for current events (free tier: 1,000 req/month). Get key at: app.tavily.com
search.exa_desc: Semantic neural search, great for authoritative docs, papers, and tutorials (free tier: 1,000 req/month). Get key at: exa.ai
search.youtube_desc: Auto-searches tutorial videos for sports/music/arts topics (free quota: 10,000 units/day). Get key in Google Cloud Console.

about.description: A task-driven, resource-adaptive AI learning system.
about.ai_models: AI: Claude · GPT · Gemini · Grok · DeepSeek · Qwen · MiniMax · OpenRouter · Ollama
